allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Get-Process cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Output done")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Output ok")

Bash(git -c user.email="dev@koval.coach" -c user.name="Koval Dev" commit -m "Make build Vercel-friendly \(skip db push\)")
